_comment: AutoCoder Hook 规则配置，借鉴 Claude Code security-guidance patterns.py

PreToolUse.name: block-rm-rf
PreToolUse.message: Dangerous 'rm -rf' command is blocked. Use mcp_delete_file for single files.

PreToolUse.name: block-format-disk
PreToolUse.message: Disk format command is blocked by policy.

PreToolUse.name: block-interactive-commands
PreToolUse.message: Interactive commands (vim/nano/top/less) are blocked. Use mcp_read_file/mcp_write_file instead.

PreToolUse.name: block-subprocess-shell-true
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: subprocess with shell=True enables command injection.
SAFE: use subprocess.run(['cmd', arg]) with a list, without shell=True.

PreToolUse.name: block-os-system-injection
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: os.system() runs a shell and is a command-injection sink.
SAFE: use subprocess.run(['cmd', arg]) with a list instead.

PreToolUse.name: warn-eval-injection
PreToolUse.message: ⚠️ Security Warning: eval() executes arbitrary code. Use json.loads() for data or ast.literal_eval() for Python literals instead.

PreToolUse.name: warn-pickle-deserialization
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: pickle.load/loads from untrusted sources allows arbitrary code execution.
SAFE: use JSON or msgspec for simple data instead.

PreToolUse.name: warn-unsafe-yaml-load
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: yaml.load() can execute arbitrary Python via !!python/object tags.
SAFE: use yaml.safe_load() instead.

PreToolUse.name: warn-tls-verification-disabled
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: TLS verification is disabled. This allows MITM attacks.
Remove verify=False and use proper certificates.

PreToolUse.name: warn-sensitive-files
PreToolUse.message: ⚠️ Writing to a sensitive file. Ensure no credentials are hardcoded.

PreToolUse.name: warn-hardcoded-secrets
PreToolUse.message:
⚠️ Security Warning: Possible hardcoded secret detected (password/token/api_key assignment).
Use environment variables or a secrets manager instead.

PostToolUse.name: warn-before-delete
PostToolUse.message: ⚠️ File deletion executed. Ensure user has confirmed this action.
